metadata.name: Handle a Purchase Order Change Request

description: A procurement manager needs to change the quantity of an item on a purchase order that has already been sent to a supplier.

nodes.task_description: Identify the PO and check its status.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the supplier has acknowledged the PO but has not yet shipped it.

nodes.task_description: Contact the supplier to request the change in quantity.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends a formal change request to the supplier.

nodes.task_description: The supplier agrees to the change. Update the PO in the system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully modifies the PO with the new quantity.
